// PerkOS baseline: Templated by perkos-entrypoint.sh on container start. __VARS__ get replaced from env. BYOK can override the provider at runtime via OPENCLAW_PROVIDER_OVERRIDE=anthropic|openai|openrouter + the matching *_API_KEY var.
// channel plugins: Each entry below is toggled per-agent by the matching *_ENABLED env var. The plugin manifest (extensions/<id>/openclaw.plugin.json) declares which channel env vars it consumes — telegram reads TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, slack reads SLACK_BOT_TOKEN + SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET. Those env vars flow into the runtime container from ecsProvision regardless of the runtime an agent picks; once a plugin is enabled here it activates on first message.
